parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO invoices (
  invoice_id, vendor_name, vendor_cif, invoice_number, invoice_date, due_date,
  subtotal, tax_rate, tax_amount, total, currency, payment_concept, bank_iban,
  line_items, status, confidence_score, email_from, email_subject, email_message_id,
  attachment_type, raw_llm_output
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.invoice_id }}', '{{ $json.vendor_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.vendor_cif }}',
  '{{ $json.invoice_number }}',
  {{ $json.invoice_date ? "'" + $json.invoice_date + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.due_date ? "'" + $json.due_date + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.subtotal }}, {{ $json.tax_rate }}, {{ $json.tax_amount }}, {{ $json.total }},
  '{{ $json.currency }}', '{{ $json.payment_concept.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.bank_iban }}',
  '{{ $json.line_items }}'::jsonb, 'pending', {{ $json.confidence_score }},
  '{{ $json.email_from.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.email_subject.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.email_message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.attachment_type }}', '{{ $json.raw_llm_output.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
) RETURNING id, invoice_id;
